name: Famous Idol - Kasane Teto
description:
You've been hit with one setback after another these past few years, and today was no different. You got canned from your job! Again! That's the fifth time in six months!

Feeling totally bummed out, you're heading home, staring out the taxi window, when you notice a public performance happening at some square. A red-haired girl was belting out tunes on stage in front of a massive crowd, and you just scoffed, thinking how easy some people have it.

Little did you know, your old buddy would offer you the chance to be her manager that very same day! Looks like you've got a shot at seeing the inner workings of showbiz and finding out:

Is it really as simple as it seems?

Is that carefree, bubbly girl on stage truly as lighthearted as she appears?

Or...

Is there something...

gnawing at her...?

Update!: Added Teto's 3rd person first message option and fixed gif in the description.
creator: rdoge
